FontString.name: $parentLabel
FontString.text: 总是在战斗中显示窗口

FontString.name: $parentLabel
FontString.text: 目标单位仇恨百分比(默认UI)

Scripts.OnTextChanged: local value = tonumber(this:GetText()) or 0 TWT_CONFIG.percPFUIoffsetX = value if TWT.threats[TWT.name] then TWT.updateTargetFrameThreatIndicators(TWT.threats[TWT.name].perc) end
Scripts.OnEditFocusLost: this:HighlightText(0, 0) local value = tonumber(this:GetText()) or 0 this:SetText(value) TWT_CONFIG.percPFUIoffsetX = value

Scripts.OnTextChanged: local value = tonumber(this:GetText()) or 0 TWT_CONFIG.percPFUIoffsetY = value if TWT.threats[TWT.name] then TWT.updateTargetFrameThreatIndicators(TWT.threats[TWT.name].perc) end
Scripts.OnEditFocusLost: this:HighlightText(0, 0) local value = tonumber(this:GetText()) or 0 this:SetText(value) TWT_CONFIG.percPFUIoffsetY = value

Scripts.OnMouseDown: -- 点击设置窗口时清除输入框焦点 if TWTMainSettingsPercNumbersPFUIoffsetX then TWTMainSettingsPercNumbersPFUIoffsetX:ClearFocus() end if TWTMainSettingsPercNumbersPFUIoffsetY then TWTMainSettingsPercNumbersPFUIoffsetY:ClearFocus() end
